title: Integrate Zephyr transport lifecycle fixes
description: Recover BLE MTU/worst-case encoding, SLIP invalid-escape recovery, and KISS shutdown/stats fixes on top of the newer link migration.
acceptance_criteria: BLE cannot overflow; invalid SLIP discards full frame then recovers; KISS deinit stops RX without UAF; both native platforms and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Completed as part of i869 transplant
